history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward, and the path directly ahead is blocked by lava in the visible area. The safest immediate move is to turn right so I can face along the open corridor and continue navigating around the hazard.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is safe floor and the path forward appears open, while the wall is to my right. Moving forward is the best next step to continue along the corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The wall is directly ahead, so I cannot move forward. I should turn left to change direction and look for a safe passage around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Iâ€™m facing toward a wall immediately ahead, so moving forward is blocked. Turning right should orient me along the open corridor toward the accessible area.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. Turning left should reorient me toward the open space on the left side of the corridor.
</thought>

<thought>
The cell ahead of me is a safe floor cell, while turning would not be necessary right now. I will move forward to continue through the open path.
</thought>
<action>

</action>
